author: urbanmorph
description: Share markdown files instantly via mdshare.live. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Urban Morph
manifest.description: Share markdown files instantly via mdshare.live.
manifest.name: mdshare

name: mdshare

releases.author: sathya-sankaran
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Filename becomes the share title.** Sharing a file (right-click → "Share on mdshare", or the command palette) now passes the Obsidian filename to mdshare via the new `X-Title` request header, so documents without an H1 in the body get titled with the filename instead of "Untitled".
- Selection sharing is unchanged — selections have no natural title and continue to fall back to the backend's H1 extraction.

The header value is percent-encoded for safe transport of unicode filenames.

Requires mdshare backend at commit [1b9e956](https://github.com/urbanmorph/mdshare/commit/1b9e956) or later (already deployed).

releases.author: sathya-sankaran
releases.description:
Addresses findings from the Obsidian community review dashboard.

- Type the API response to remove `any`-typed warnings on `res.json`
- Republishes the source-code fixes that landed after 1.0.0 (description punctuation, command name no longer includes the plugin name, unhandled promise warning resolved)
- Build verification: `main.js` built fresh with `npm ci && npm run build` on Node 20

No user-visible behavior change. If you're on 1.0.0, the upgrade is transparent.

releases.author: sathya-sankaran
releases.description: Initial release. Share markdown files and selections from Obsidian via mdshare.live.
